ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt
Pistachio nut, grilled, no added salt
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 34% roasted peanuts, 24% toasted almonds, 23% toasted cashew nuts, 6% pecan nuts, 5% pistachios, vegetable oils (rapeseed, olive), 2% dried olives in slices, cooking salt, onion, garlic, maltodextrin, yeast extract, pepper, anti-caking agent: silicon dioxide, flavors (contains soy), acidifying: citric acid
